en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.
Costa Rica Occupational Health Commission Applicability Assessment
This requirement is regulated by Article 288 of the Labor Code and detailed in the Regulations of Occupational Health Commissions and Offices or Departments (Decree N.º 39408-MTSS).
Is your company required to form an Occupational Health Commission and register it with the Ministry of Labor and Social Security (MTSS) in accordance with the Costa Rican Labor Code?
Registration requirements can be found on the Occupational Health Council (CSO) website.\n
Please select from the following reasons your company is exempt from needing to register an Occupational Health Commission and register it with the Ministry of Labor and Social Security (MTSS).
The company has fewer than 10 employees working in Costa Rica.
By providing your electronic signature, you confirm that the information submitted in this questionnaire is true, complete, and accurate in accordance with Costa Rican legislation.
Please explain why your company is exempt from needing to register an Occupational Health Commission and register it with the Ministry of Labor and Social Security (MTSS).
